welcome_card.body_1.text: How can I help you today? Choose an option below:
welcome_card.actions_0.title: Create Ticket
welcome_card.actions_1.title: Check Status
welcome_card.actions_2.title: Search KB
welcome_card.actions_3.title: My Tickets
welcome_card.actions_4.title: Disconnect
jira_connect_card.body_1.text: This IT Helpdesk requires access to your Jira account to create and manage support tickets, search the knowledge base, and handle escalations.
jira_connect_card.body_2.facts_0.title: Provider
jira_connect_card.body_2.facts_1.title: Permissions
jira_connect_card.body_3.text: You will be redirected to Atlassian to authorize this application. Your credentials are securely handled via OAuth 2.0.
jira_connect_card.actions_0.title: Connect to Jira
jira_connect_card.actions_1.title: Cancel
create_ticket_card.body_2.label: Summary
create_ticket_card.body_3.label: Description
create_ticket_card.body_3.placeholder: Detailed description of the issue, steps to reproduce, expected behavior...
create_ticket_card.body_4.label: Issue Type
create_ticket_card.body_5.label: Priority
create_ticket_card.body_6.label: Category
create_ticket_card.actions_0.title: Submit Ticket
create_ticket_card.actions_1.title: Cancel
ticket_status_card.body_1.facts_0.title: Priority
ticket_status_card.body_1.facts_1.title: Assignee
ticket_status_card.body_1.facts_2.title: Reporter

ticket_status_card.body_1.facts_4.title: Updated

ticket_status_card.actions_1.title: Escalate

kb_results_card.actions_2.title: Back
escalation_card.body_2.text: Escalating this ticket will increase its priority and route it to the next support tier. Please provide the reason and select the new priority level.
escalation_card.body_3.label: Escalate To Priority
escalation_card.body_3.choices_0.title: Highest - Critical, requires immediate response
escalation_card.body_3.choices_1.title: High - Major impact, needs urgent attention
escalation_card.body_4.label: Escalation Tier
escalation_card.body_4.choices_0.title: Tier 2 - Senior Support Engineer
escalation_card.body_4.choices_1.title: Tier 3 - Subject Matter Expert
escalation_card.body_4.choices_2.title: Management - Operations Manager
escalation_card.body_5.label: Reason for Escalation
escalation_card.body_5.placeholder: Explain why this ticket needs escalation (e.g., SLA breach, customer impact, recurring issue)...
escalation_card.body_5.errorMessage: Please provide a reason for escalation
escalation_card.body_6.label: Urgency Level
escalation_card.body_6.choices_0.title: Immediate - Needs resolution within 1 hour
escalation_card.body_6.choices_1.title: Standard - Needs resolution within 4 hours
escalation_card.body_6.choices_2.title: Next Business Day - Needs resolution by next business day
escalation_card.actions_0.title: Confirm Escalation
escalation_card.actions_1.title: Cancel
